form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on March 27 over 300m at this track behind Truth Teller beaten 2.75 lengths (17.21) in a Grade 5. Was in the money three on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a second (19.45) in a GR 6 at Murray Bridge Straight and returns after a 12 weeks break. Has won both starts when resuming. Expected to feature on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished off last campaign with a second (19.45) in a GR 6 at Murray Bridge Straight and returns after a 12 weeks break. Has won both starts when resuming. Expected to feature on best form.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a sixth (23.11) in a GR 4/5 at Geelong and returns after a 11 weeks break. Super consistent fresh, having never missed the frame from three starts. Worth including among the chances.

formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a sixth (23.11) in a GR 4/5 at Geelong and returns after a 11 weeks break. Super consistent fresh, having never missed the frame from three starts. Worth including among the chances.

form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was a strong winner scoring by half a length in a Mix 6/7 at this track and clocking a brilliant 16.57 for the 300m trip. Can feature on best figures.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 390m at Ballarat. That followed a win two back in 19.50 beating Master Your Mind over 350m at this track. Others read better.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 300m at this track in a handy (16.86), beating Search History. Will find this a bit tougher, prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Placed last time (16.69) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing second and beaten 0.8 lengths. Has three successes and five minors from 13 starts from box 7. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (31.27) when sixth over 530m at Angle Park in a Special conditions race. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Suited here and expected to run well.
